name: The Unmarked Hours
specialty: A tight-knit team of stealth experts, skilled in infiltrating and securing rift zones before they wreak havoc on the Undercity

members.name: Thalia Valtoris
members.note: Scars crisscross her face from countless close calls, but her cold, calculating gaze never falters

members.name: Jax Rivenclaw
members.note: His tail is adorned with intricate silver rings, a constant reminder of his family's debt to the Tower Authority

members.name: Kael Vangard
members.note: His battle-worn armor is inscribed with runes that hum menacingly when he enters combat

visual: Clad in black, hooded cloaks with the Tower Authority insignia hidden beneath, they move through the Undercity like shadows, striking with precision and disappearing without a trace
reputation_note: Rumored to be the only crew that can enter a rift zone and come out alive, they are both feared and respected by all factions in the Undercity
history: [2026-03-15] Failed a inter-guild-tier contract. Rank: Unknown (-2/5)
